summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DataForge app redesign with professional Swiss-style design. All core functionality working correctly including backend APIs, frontend UI, file upload, data cleaning workflow, and download functionality.
passed_tests: File upload functionality with CSV files up to 500MB
Data cleaning actions (remove duplicates, fill missing values, remove outliers, clean text)
Landing page loads with professional design
Logo displays correctly (/logo.png) with red spiral design
Hero section with 'Shape Your Data Into Clarity' heading
Features section with all 6 feature cards using Lucide icons
'Get Started Free' button navigation to upload page
Upload page displays 'DATA FORGE' and 'YOUR DATA, PERFECTED.' with serif font
Dashboard displays after file upload with stats, data table, and charts
Color scheme correctly uses slate gray with red (#D90429) accents
Typography uses Playfair Display serif font for branding
All About section cards (accuracy, speed, users, countries)
How It Works section with 3 steps
Reset functionality returns to landing page
Data quality scoring and AI-powered cleaning workflow
